longDescription: Discover Lauterbrunnen Helicopter Skydive in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Skydiving
subcategory.description: Find and book the right skydive for you here. The ultimate adrenaline kick you get without a doubt during the free fall. You jump in a tandem jump from a height of three to four kilometers into nothingness and you don't even need any training. Hotspots for skydiving are Interlaken, Reichenbach, Lucerne, Zurich and Lugano. You can jump either from a helicopter or from a plane.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Lauterbrunnen Valley: View of the mountains during the skydiving tandem flight with helicopter. Ideal for adventure seekers.
Tandem Skydive: Experience the thrill above the Lauterbrunnen Valley with a helicopter and excellent views.
Eiger Skydive: Jump into the Lauterbrunnen Valley with fantastic views of the mountains.
Tandem skydive: Experience flying over the Lauterbrunnen Valley with views of waterfalls and mountains.
Skydive: Experience the view of Lauterbrunnen Valley and the Swiss Alps from the sky.
Skydive Eiger: Tandem jump over the snow-covered mountains in winter, unforgettable adventure in Switzerland
Tandem skydive in Lauterbrunnen Valley with mountain views, unforgettable experience while skydiving.
